name: iqueryable-persistence-projection
intent: Enable persistence as projection over queryable entities with schema-driven, backend-agnostic query comprehension. Provides IQueryable interface for chainable queries, MongoDB-style operators, backend abstraction with capability declaration, and isomorphic execution across browser/server contexts.

indicators: Cross-cutting query capability used by all domain features
No external API calls - purely internal platform capability
Extends existing IPersistenceService with read-path abstraction
Environment DI pattern for dependency injection
uncertainties: Library choice for query AST (@ucast vs custom)
Library choice for in-memory execution (sift vs mingo vs custom)
Library choice for SQL compilation (@ucast/sql vs Kysely vs Drizzle)
